welcome.title: Welcome to GT-Companion
welcome.lead: GT-Companion is an unofficial, solo-developed companion site for Galactic Tycoons.
welcome.body: View or plan existing and new bases, check profitability of recipes, plan research and ships, view guild donations, and much more.

base.label: Base
base.desc: Plan upgrades or new bases, test production scenarios under different conditions and track issues across your company.

exchange.label: Exchange
exchange.desc: Review exchange data, see what is being sold and export market insights.

profitability.label: Profitability
profitability.desc: Compare recipe profitability with deep configuration, review detailed stats and build full production chains.

research.label: R&D
research.desc: Estimate research costs, plan perk point allocation and compare priorities across different specs.

guild.label: Guild
guild.desc: Track guild projects, monitor donations and compare member research levels across different specs.

flight.label: Flight planner
flight.desc: Simulate single or multi-leg flights, test ship layouts and compare costs across multiple route options.

galaxy.label: Galaxy map
galaxy.desc: Explore the galaxy, view system details, find planets and plan expansion across the map.

leaderboard.label: Leaderboard
leaderboard.desc: Browse guild and company rankings, compare stats and follow global event activity.

settings.label: Settings
settings.desc: Configure your API key, adjust app preferences and manage sharing settings.

more.label: And more
more.desc: Actively developed with more features, refinements and polish on the way.

gettingStarted.title: Getting started
gettingStarted.referralNote: The "Play Galactic Tycoons" button uses a referral link.
gettingStarted.coffeeNote: Enjoying GT-Companion? You can buy me a coffee to help keep the site running.

steps.one: Add your Galactic Tycoons API key in Settings to unlock full access.
steps.two: Explore the pages and see what GT-Companion has to offer.
steps.three: Enjoy the companion site and share feedback or bug reports in the tools thread on the official Discord server for Galactic Tycoons.

activityModal.title: Game Activity History
activityModal.footnote: Active tiers reflect last seen windows for each day. New = founded within 24h of that date.

errors.loadTrackerActivity: Failed to load tracker game activity
